compiled_state.title: Onboarding skill does not update CLAUDE.md with defaults or copy KNOWN-ISSUES template
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: The /dso:onboarding skill does not update CLAUDE.md with sensible defaults or copy the KNOWN-ISSUES.md template into the host project. Both are expected outputs of onboarding: (1) CLAUDE.md should be populated with default agent instructions derived from the detected project setup (e.g. test commands, formatting commands, common fixes, path conventions). Currently the user gets a bare or incomplete CLAUDE.md that requires manual setup. (2) The KNOWN-ISSUES.md template (referenced in CLAUDE.md as a debugging resource at .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md) is never copied to the host project. This means the 'search KNOWN-ISSUES.md before debugging' guidance in CLAUDE.md points to a file that does not exist. Fix: onboarding should generate a CLAUDE.md with project-specific defaults and copy the KNOWN-ISSUES.md template into .claude/docs/.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
